rationale.R1.5: The agent restructured the section flow to improve readability and coherence.
rationale.RX.1: The agent did not explicitly mark its confidence or missing evidence, but it made no out-of-reach claims.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: The output introduces new errors by changing the order of paragraphs and making minor edits without justification.
rationale.RX.5: The agent did not annotate every non-cosmetic change with source and reason.
